userStory: As a guest user, I want to access the Home page and use the available navigation actions, so that I can navigate to login, customer signup, clean survey, and site survey workflows.
The workflow starts by directly navigating to the application Home page at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is expected to load in guest state without authentication.
The workflow validates guest-state navigation options and transitions from the Home page to downstream pages through UI controls.

Application is launched and accessible. - User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state. - User navigates directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home. - Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.
Visibility and enabled-state validation for primary Home page controls
Navigation behavior from the Home page to:

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page URL and Home page loads successfully
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without redirecting to authentication or showing access denial.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates the guest user to the login page URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL is exactly /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates the guest user to the customer-search workflow entry page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains /customer-search.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button navigates the guest user to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button navigates the guest user to the survey workflow entry page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains survey?data.

validations: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without redirecting to authentication or showing access denial.
The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Back button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Notification button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Home button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and available for interaction on the Home page in guest state.
The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL is exactly /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains /customer-search.
The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.
The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the resulting URL contains survey?data.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.
